description: Polish and wire QuantDrive - integrate @quant/brand, wire real API via React Query, add Framer Motion spring animations, loading/empty/error/success states, responsive 360-1440px, dark mode, virtualized file lists, blurhash, accessibility.
steps: 1. Add @quant/brand to package.json dependencies and add path mappings to tsconfig.json
2. Update src/app/globals.css to use brand tokens. Use quantdrive app color (#6366F1) as --brand-app-color. Dark mode vars from brand dark theme
3. Update src/app/layout.tsx: import quantdrive config from @quant/brand, set brand icon, theme-color meta

4. Update src/hooks/useFiles.ts: already using React Query, ensure mutations for upload/delete/move/rename/star operations. Add useMutation hooks. Wire to real backend via /api/files route (proxying to QUANTDRIVE_BACKEND_URL). Add optimistic updates for file operations
5. Update src/hooks/useStorageQuota.ts: wire to real /api/storage/quota route. Proper loading/error states

6. Update src/components/FileBrowser.tsx: add Framer Motion spring stagger for file grid/list animations. Virtualize large file lists (for 60fps scrolling). Add drag-and-drop upload zone. Grid/list view toggle with spring transition

7. Update src/components/FileCard.tsx and FolderCard.tsx: add spring scale microinteraction on hover/press. Add blurhash placeholder for image thumbnails. 44px minimum tap target. Focus ring with brand ring color
8. Update src/components/UploadArea.tsx: add spring animation for upload progress, success/error states with brand colors, drag-over highlight effect
9. Update src/components/FilePreview.tsx: add spring slide-in panel animation, loading state for preview content, proper dark mode
10. Update src/components/ShareDialog.tsx: spring dialog animation, form validation, success/error feedback
11. Update src/components/StorageBar.tsx: animated progress bar with brand colors, responsive text sizing
12. Update src/components/Breadcrumbs.tsx: spring animation for breadcrumb changes, responsive truncation
13. Update src/components/SearchResults.tsx: loading skeleton, empty state, spring stagger for results
14. Update src/app/page.tsx: ensure all states (loading/empty/error) are handled with brand-themed shared-ui components
15. Ensure responsive 360-1440px, dark mode, 44px tap targets throughout
16. Run pnpm --filter @quant/quantdrive typecheck && pnpm --filter @quant/quantdrive lint to verify
acceptance_criteria: pnpm --filter @quant/quantdrive typecheck passes with zero errors
pnpm --filter @quant/quantdrive lint passes with zero errors
@quant/brand is imported and used (motion springs, app config, theme colors)
All file operations wired to real API routes (no mock data)
React Query mutations for upload/delete/move/rename with optimistic updates
Framer Motion spring animations on file grid, cards, dialogs, panels
Dark mode fully functional with brand dark theme colors
All interactive elements have 44px minimum tap targets and proper aria attributes
